name: dj
description: Read and act on your own Dynamite Jobs company data via the public Company API.
long_description: Single-file Python client for the public DJ Company API at https://api.dynamitejobs.com. Same file runs three ways: CLI, Python library, and MCP server (--mcp flag, opt-in mcp dependency). Compatible with Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, and any other Agent Skills / MCP-compatible tool. Covers company profile (read+update), jobs (CRUD + trial + publish + repromote), applications (read + status updates + notes + filtered pile), candidates (only ones who applied to your jobs), analytics (jobs/funnel/sources), billing status, and rate-limit introspection.
